title: Thoughts: AI agent for Backtesting.
author: Trenqbix
selftext:
We have been working on an idea to develop an AI agent for backtesting. This will enable users to backtest multiple strategies within minutes. All the user has to do, is enter a strategy as a prompt and the agent will do the rest. 

In that regard, it would really help us if you could answer the following:  
How often do you actually backtest your strategy?   
How long does it actually take from ideation to coding / vibe coding your strategy in meta trader/trading view etc.?  
What is it the you look for in the backtesting results? eg. trades, ratios like sharpe, or any visual representation of the backtest.

In addition to this any inputs / critiques will be really helpful.
